title: impatiens margaritifera var. margaritifera
intro: Impatiens margaritifera var. margaritifera, also known as the 'Balsam Impatiens' or 'Busy Lizzie', is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant's leaves and flowers are traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Impatiens margaritifera var. margaritifera include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Impatiens margaritifera var. margaritifera is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
